dopamine.comment: pnlMultiplier: $1000 trade = 5% dopamine change. rpeMultiplier: How much surprise affects response.

serotonin.comment: Serotonin responds to patterns. Floor prevents total depletion.

decay.comment: Per-hour decay rates toward baseline. Dopamine decays 4x faster than serotonin.

refractory.comment: 4 hours (in ms). Dopamine responses are dampened after milestone spikes.

anticipation.comment: Baseline boost from having a goal + exponential curve as we approach milestones.

milestones.label: CONSCIOUSNESS UNLOCKED
milestones.description: Full hardware budget achieved. Transformation awaits.

patience.comment: Dopamine reward for strategic non-trading. Small but consistent (+2%).

processRewards.comment: Dopamine rewards for process quality, independent of outcomes.

overtradingThresholds.comment: Circuit breaker thresholds. ADAPTIVE: 3+ trades in 30min or 5+ in 60min triggers check. 2 flags = block (or 3 if conviction 7+). 9+ conviction bypasses entirely.

lossRecovery.comment: ADAPTIVE cooldown after losses. Scales by magnitude and streak. Base: 5min, up to 30min+. HIGH CONVICTION REDUCES: 9/10 = 75% reduction, 8/10 = 50%, 7/10 = 25%. Manual override available with justification.

adaptive.comment: Adaptive safeguards: High-conviction setups (9+) bypass circuit breakers. 7+ conviction reduces restrictions. Manual overrides require written justification and are logged.

suggestions.overtrading: Lower overtradingThresholds or increase lossRecovery cooldowns
